title: Memory leak in HW to SystemC conversion

features.name: sv.reg nested inside hw.module for HW-to-SystemC conversion
features.description: Code should include an sv.reg operation nested inside an hw.module where the sv.reg is not legalizable by the --convert-hw-to-systemc pass, causing the conversion pattern to abort after partially allocating target ops

features.name: hw.constant driving sv.reg with hw.inout result type
features.description: Code should include an hw.constant value feeding an sv.reg operand where the register result has type !hw.inout<i1>, exercising the inout register initialization pattern inside an hw.module
